use_cases: Display and manage sales leads in a CRM dashboard with sortable columns
Track lead status, probability, and engagement metrics across the sales pipeline
View lead source attribution (organic vs campaign) and deal sizes
Monitor customer interest trends via embedded sparkline visualizations
Take actions on individual leads through contextual menus and callbacks
ai_summary: A comprehensive sales leads data table component for CRM dashboards that displays customer information including contact details, source attribution, deal values, and engagement metrics. Features animated sparkline charts for interest tracking, status badges, probability indicators, and theming support via next-themes. Built for B2B SaaS platforms with smooth Framer Motion animations and accessibility considerations for reduced motion preferences.
